description: Karaite bill of divorce. Date: 3 Iyyar 5437 AM (1677 CE). Location: Cairo. The husband Yiṣḥaq b. Aharon b. Mordekhay Rofe issues the get to Sitt al-Bayt bt. Yosef b. Elʿazar Rofe. Both of their nomenclature ends with "and every name that [they] and their family have." The get was issued by the scribe Barūkh Rofe and witnessed by Shemuʾel Berakha and Yosef Ṣaʿīr. On the verso, Moshe Ḥazan and Yahuda Rofe sign as witnesses that the bill of divorce "reached her hand." The notes in Judaeo-Arabic below these signatures require further examination for content and are likely unrelated to the bill of divorce. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
